Beauty Shop (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $36,351,350Details
International Box Office $2,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $38,351,350
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,801,465 (35.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.84 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:94.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,659 opening theaters/2,659 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $67,825,603

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 30th, 2005 (Wide) by MGM
International Releases: June 3rd, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: August 1st, 2005 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual material, language and brief drug references.
Running Time: 105 minutes
Plot point: African Americans
Social setting: Beauty Industry
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
